description: Product description Description: This hair clipper set delivers the very best hair cutting experience and saves you money, it's very useful both in home and salon use! Low noise and no dangling cord will also enhance its use. This combined, with the small and delicate clipper body, you can also can give hair cuts to all family members as well as being ideal for pets of all sizes. This new professional wireless hair clipper set will provide you and your family with excellent cutting experience. No more expensive bills for hair cutting and you can do it in an easy way. Specification: Input Power: 100V-240V 50/60HZ Dimension: 270*200*58mm Charging time: 2-3 hours Using time: 8 hours Net weight: 575g Power cord length: about 180cm Accessories: 3mm, 6mm, 9mm, 12mm comb guides (used for adjusting hair length), adapter, lithium battery. Package: 1 x Cordless Hair Clippers 1 x UK standard AC Power Adapter 1 x Rechargeable battery 1 x Cleaning Brush 4 x Comb Attachments 1x User Manual Note: Due to the shipping restrictions, your package does not include oil accessories,hope you can understand. Safety Warning Always unplug the trimmer when not in use. Keep it away from water sources. Avoid using it on infants or near sensitive areas. Always follow the recommended cleaning and maintenance procedures. Use only the recommended oil for lubrication.
